description:
Add the `workerExecution` configuration block that controls which execution substrate is used for new workers.

## What to implement

In `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/config.ts`:

```ts
workerExecution: {
  mode: "current-branch" | "worktree";  // default: "worktree" initially (flipped in Phase 5)
  maxLifetime: number | null;           // ms, default: null (no limit) â€” crash detection timeout
  review: {
    enabled: boolean;                   // default: true â€” per-worker review for current-branch
  };
}
```

Environment overrides:
- `PI_BEADWORK_WORKER_EXECUTION_MODE=current-branch|worktree`
- `PI_BEADWORK_WORKER_MAX_LIFETIME=300000` (ms, optional)

## Design Rules

- Default to `"worktree"` during development (Phase 5 flips to `"current-branch"`)
- Env override takes precedence over config file
- `maxLifetime` is for crash detection timeout; `null` means rely only on supervisor polling
- `review.enabled` controls per-worker review for current-branch mode ONLY
- Existing `worktrees` config remains but applies ONLY when mode is `worktree`
- Do NOT let worktree-specific config (`copyFiles`, `setupCommands`, `cleanup`, `rerunSetupOnReuse`) leak into current-branch behavior
- `landing.review.enabled` is a SEPARATE setting for worktree landing review â€” it must NOT control current-branch review

## Isolation Semantics

When `mode = "current-branch"`:
- `worktrees.copyFiles` â†’ ignored
- `worktrees.setupCommands` â†’ ignored
- `worktrees.cleanup` â†’ ignored
- `worktrees.rerunSetupOnReuse` â†’ ignored
- `landing.review.enabled` â†’ does NOT control current-branch review (separate concern)
- `workerExecution.review.enabled` â†’ DOES control current-branch review

When `mode = "worktree"`:
- `workerExecution.review.enabled` â†’ ignored (worktree uses `landing.review.enabled`)
- All existing worktree config applies as before

## Tests

- Config loads defaults correctly (`mode: "worktree"`, `maxLifetime: null`, `review.enabled: true`)
- Env override works for mode
- `maxLifetime` parses null and numeric values
- Worktree config is not consulted when mode is `current-branch`
- `landing.review.enabled = false` does NOT affect `workerExecution.review.enabled`
- Both review settings are independent

## Definition of Done

- Config block loads from file and env
- Type-safe access to `config.workerExecution.mode`, `.maxLifetime`, `.review.enabled`
- Isolation rules enforced at config resolution time
- Tests cover all cases
- lint/test/typecheck pass clean
title: Add workerExecution config block with mode and maxLifetime
